text:
Medicare LT services. January through December. 0 = no LTC stay during the month
1 = at least one day of the month in LTC setting
L_LTINST_MOS Months in Long Term Care Setting. Count of months where L_LTINST_IND_<M>=1 XX
Dual Eligibility E_MAX_DUAL_1 - 12 Monthly code indicating if Medicaid enrollee is covered by Medicare. January through December. 00 - Eligible is not a Medicare Beneficiary
01 - Eligible is entitled to Medicare - QMB only
02 - Eligible is entitled to Medicare - QMB and Full
